data.title: 国际服主线Vol.5 第一章后篇更新
data.summary: [Main Story Announcement] The second half of Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 1: Like the Flo
data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

The second half of Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 1: Like the Flower That Wishes to Bloom is coming soon, Sensei!

Please look forward to it!
